resources.string: A secure cross-platform 2FA client for Wear OS.
Your support helps maintain Outlaw 2FA.\n\nTap the button below to visit the project page.
To import secrets from Bitwarden, export an unencrypted Bitwarden JSON file and place it in the following directory:
Export your accounts and take a picture of the QR code. Make sure it is a JPG/PNG image and place it in the following directory:
Take a picture of a QR code, make sure it is a JPG/PNG image and place it in the following directory:
To import secrets from Aegis Authenticator, export an unencrypted Aegis JSON file and place it in the following directory:
To import secrets from andOTP, export an unencrypted andOTP JSON file and place it in the following directory:
To import secrets from a legacy backup, place your WFS file in the following directory:

To import logins from a file, export them in an unencrypted JSON format and place them on internal storage.

Supported services:
⋅ Aegis Authenticator
⋅ Bitwarden
⋅ AndOTP

To import logins via ADB, export them in unencrypted JSON format and push them using the commands below.

Supported services:
⋅ Aegis Authenticator
⋅ Bitwarden
⋅ AndOTP

Run these commands:

file=<file>
adb push $file /data/local/tmp/
adb shell run-as com.outlaw.authenticator mkdir files/
adb shell run-as com.outlaw.authenticator cp /data/local/tmp/$file files/
adb shell rm /data/local/tmp/$file
Use the file picker, ADB, or a file transfer app for this.

Copyright © 2026 Outlaw 2FA
Based on Wristkey by Owais Shaikh

Can\'t connect to Wi-Fi. Check device settings.\n\nIf Wi-Fi is unavailable, use the ADB transfer method.
Would you like to delete this item?
This QR code is invalid. Please try again.
With both devices on the same Wi-Fi, open Outlaw 2FA on the other device, select \"Receive\" and scan the QR code.
With both devices on the same Wi-Fi, open Outlaw 2FA on the other device, select \"Receive\" and enter the IP shown.
With both devices on the same Wi-Fi, open Outlaw 2FA on the other device, select \"Send\" and scan this QR code or enter the IP shown.
Enter the OTP displayed on the other device to start transfer.
Enter this OTP on the other device to complete transfer.
This is an Outlaw 2FA Wi-Fi transfer server. It is ephemeral and encrypted. 🖕😉
Scan this QR Code or enter the IP address shown below it.
View up to 4 2FA codes instantly. To change what tiles appear, open the Outlaw 2FA app and drag to reorder.
